description_long: This is a modern L-shaped kitchen cabinetry set featuring a combination of tall pantry units, base cabinets, and open shelving. The cabinetry is predominantly white with sleek, flat-panel doors and integrated bar pulls, complemented by a wood-textured countertop that runs along both arms of the L-shape. The left section includes a tall refrigerator unit and a built-in oven, while the right section features open shelving and glass-fronted cabinets for display or easy access. The base cabinets provide ample storage with multiple drawers and doors, and the upper cabinets offer additional enclosed storage. The cabinetry is installed on a dark wood floor panel, enhancing its contemporary aesthetic. The overall design is functional and visually cohesive, suitable for urban residential or communal kitchen spaces.
description: A modern L-shaped kitchen cabinetry set with white flat-panel doors, wood countertops, and integrated bar pulls, featuring tall pantry, base, and open shelving units.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, tall pantry, built-in oven, and a mix of drawers and cabinets.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the countertop workspace, sink area, and open shelving above.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tall refrigerator unit, additional drawers, and the side of the open shelving.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the tall pantry and oven section, with the cabinetry extending along the floor panel.
attribute_cabinet_type: L-shaped kitchen base and tall pantry cabinet set
attribute_door_configuration: combination of single door, double door, drawers, and open shelf
